name: psycheros-entity-core
description: Read Psycheros entity-core context and record memories from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Read Psycheros context and record memories from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Psycheros Entity Core connects Codex to the local Psycheros entity-core data directory through an included MCP server. It exposes status, identity context, memory and graph search, fetch tools, and a governed memory-recording tool. Identity/core edits are not exposed.
defaultPrompt: Search Psycheros memory for this project.
Record this project update as a Psycheros memory.
